meta.title: Office Brain - Enterprise AI Platform | D'auchy.Studio
meta.description: Office Brain - An integrated enterprise AI assistant combining AI chat, file management, secure sharing, search, and image generation. Realizing AI utilization while maintaining security and governance.

hero.title: OfficeBrain
hero.subtitle: A RAG system that enables file sharing and permission management within organizations. Achieving secure information sharing and improving work efficiency.
hero.description: An integrated enterprise AI assistant combining AI chat, file management, secure sharing, search, and image generation

whatIs.title: What is Office Brain?
whatIs.description: Office Brain is an integrated platform for companies to use AI more conveniently and safely within the enterprise. It consolidates functions that enterprises need into one system, including multi-AI engine chat, semantic search of internal documents, secure file management, and information sharing with approval workflows.
whatIs.note: 💡 Realizing AI-powered business efficiency while maintaining security and governance

items.title: Enterprise-Level Security
items.description: Safely manage confidential information with department-based access control and approval workflows

items.title: Significant Efficiency Improvement
items.description: Streamline daily operations with AI chat, semantic search, and image generation

items.title: Transparent Operations
items.description: Promote cost management and appropriate usage through usage visualization

steps.title: User Registration & Login
steps.description: Administrator creates employee accounts, each employee logs in safely

steps.title: AI Chat & File Utilization
steps.description: Interact with multiple AIs, upload internal documents and utilize with semantic search

steps.title: Approval, Sharing & Analysis
steps.description: Share files through approval workflows, analyze usage to optimize costs

items.title: User Management & Security
items.description: Account management for each employee, department/role-based access control, profile editing features.
details: Individual account creation for each employee

items.title: Multi-AI Chat
items.description: Choose from multiple AIs like ChatGPT, Google Gemini. Includes history saving and search functions.
details: Automatic conversation history saving and search
Support for Japanese, English, and Vietnamese

items.title: Secure File Management
items.description: Upload PDF, Word, Excel, images up to 50MB. Safe sharing with approval workflows.

items.title: AI Semantic Search (RAG)
items.description: Search documents by meaning rather than keywords. Advanced search that displays reference materials together.

items.title: AI Image Generation
items.description: AI automatically generates illustrations and diagrams based on instructions. Perfect for creating presentation materials.

items.title: Usage Analytics
items.description: Track AI usage at employee, department, and company levels. Cost management with real-time monitoring.

items.title: System Management
items.description: Administrator control of vector search settings adjustment, batch processing, and overall settings.

items.title: Approval & Notification System
items.description: File sharing includes approval workflows, with notification features for smooth workflow realization.

items.title: Multi-language & Multi-device Support
items.description: Support for Japanese, English, Vietnamese, same user experience on smartphone, tablet, PC, with dark mode.

items.title: Sales Department
items.description: Customer proposal creation, competitive analysis, presentation image generation

items.title: HR Department
items.description: Internal regulation search, training material creation, employee support

items.title: Development Department
items.description: Technical document search, code review support, specification document creation

items.question: What file formats are supported?
items.answer: Supports major formats including PDF, Word, Excel, PowerPoint, image files (JPG, PNG). Upload up to 50MB maximum.

items.question: Can approval workflows be customized?
items.answer: Yes. Approvers and approval stages can be flexibly configured according to departments and information confidentiality levels.

items.question: Are there usage limits?
items.answer: Monthly usage limits are set according to enterprise plans. Real-time usage monitoring with alerts when approaching limits.

items.question: Is integration with existing systems possible?
items.answer: Integration with existing HR systems and file servers is possible via API. Please contact our sales team for details.

cta.title: Ready to evolve your company's brain?
cta.description: Experience new ways of working with AI through Office Brain. An enterprise AI platform that delivers both security and operational efficiency.
